positive: Minimalist geometric illustration of a majestic forest creature, specifically a stylized, silhouette-like griffin soaring over simplified mountain peaks. The griffin should have sharp, clean lines and dynamic posing, rendered in a high-contrast black and deep emerald green palette. The background should consist of repeating, interlocking geometric patterns inspired by Art Deco and Japanese Zen aesthetics. Composition must be centered, perfect for apparel printing, with excellent negative space. Use strong backlighting and deep shadows to emphasize the silhouette and shape. Highly detailed vector art quality, graphic novel style, suitable for DTG print.
